plugins.name: cowork-ai-os
plugins.description: Turn Claude Cowork into your AI business operating system. v0.10.2 adds live-fetch — /browse-skills and /browse-connectors now pull recommendations directly from Anthropic's public Connectors directory and Plugin/Skill marketplaces, so they never go stale. /tune-up surfaces what's new since your last run. Plus onboarding, daily brief, voice writer, audit, weekly self-improvement, plan-then-approve file organization, and /optimize speed-fix.
